title: Platform Independence
description: Why building on platforms you don't control is a liability ... and what a more resilient digital structure looks like.
intro: Platform dependency is a tax most people do not notice until they get the bill. Algorithm changes, policy shifts, account restrictions, fee increases ... each one is a reminder that rented reach is not owned reach. This section covers what it looks like to build a digital presence that does not collapse when a single platform changes its terms.
